overall_justification: The only mention of the "Caixa de Conversão" is a factual statement that the Club de Engenharia's director council met to hear a reading of the project.  There is no discernible argument or editorial position presented for or against the Caixa in this edition.

supporting_evidence.quote: Em sessão extraordinaria, reuniu-se hontem o conselho director do Club de Engenharia, para ouvir a leitura do projecto da caixa de conversão.
supporting_evidence.reason_for_inclusion: This is the sole mention of the Caixa de Conversão in the entire edition and presents only a factual account of an event.
